_comment: Example company build. Copy this to presets/<yourco>.json and edit, then run: npx ai-command-center start --preset <yourco> (or set "preset": "<yourco>" in your config). Add central provider keys and allowedOrigins in your own config file, not here.

branding.name: Acme AI Command Center
branding.tagline: Centralized AI usage and cost across every product.
